textByHashes.b977dbffea26d2d93c823cfb3391b52f04128e50: Hello, . It's nice to see you again!
textByHashes.32c6c62bf1dd4e119e2d2b8ecfa3168491870fa4: Better now that my head's back in place. Thanks again for helping me with that!
textByHashes.cf0bb52c7203d32195a33dfa3033e4749225f187: Indeed. How are you finding the helm that I gave you? Does the headless illusion still work?
textByHashes.d09ad315858dd1a49e36c117190b6b3848558d9b: As a matter of fact, I do! I was recently doing some research on cabbages. I was able to extract their essence and combine it with a t-
textByHashes.22ea1704537c025ec0162991aae3cb7385e0b749: Oh. Right! I have these crystal shards that will let you escape from particularly dangerous situations. They only work in certain places. I call them Escape crystal.
textByHashes.3bbc463e7afb3e434e668e18b924c0f2ed04c41e: Sometimes you get caught in places that won't let you teleport out by normal means. These crystals are specially crafted to let you escape those scenarios.
textByHashes.bf25790dfe4bd4a414d8dd1c5bb9524ac96a3e6f: So, would you like to buy one? They cost 75000 gold each!
textByHashes.ad85f5515315288e7547d0671ba2470f0452e985: It looks like you can't afford any Escape crystals. They cost 75000 each.
textByHashes.edde6369050eabea9cff06d6537e091f424ae411: The crystals currently work in the Theatre of Blood, the Chambers of Xeric, TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges, the Inferno, Pest Control, Barbarian Assault and the Tombs of Amascut.
textByHashes.1143c8482b6590373a85a036ceec19cc28501d33: Well, there's a lot that goes into it to drive the price up that high. But I understand why you feel that way.
textByHashes.53b2e59ab9ea34fa05fc95d4a69ff668b892f09a: I still study. I'm changing my field of study though. Hopefully if I don't mess up more spells, one day I can become the head wizard.
textByHashes.b1031bc63383c2643e4d647a06bf17c10d79581b: My name is Rick. I'm a wizard student. I used to study magical farming, but I don't like it anymore.
textByHashes.c906d1eba4228fcc0725a02bd3fa9e529f8c6866: It's a bit embarassing, but... I got my head swapped with a pumpkin. Luckily an adventurer came along and helped me get it back in place.
textByHashes.318739f6048d72a2a3d0808153a7d367cc1020b0: Oh. Right! I have these crystal shards that will let you escape from particularly dangerous situations. They only work in certain places. I call them Escape crystals.
textByHashes.37c483544fa2b24006248b2f0255a6990a2bff12: Sometimes you get caught in places that won't let you teleport out by normal means. These crystals are specifically crafted to let you escape those scenarios.
textByHashes.56f0e2450056af9cf6f9c1eb6f5603e9831580ba: The Members objects I'm selling are quite delicate. I'd feel more comfortable selling them on a member's world.
textByHashes.6e1786cd33e6b0b8ab5ea3a77619d9b7237c52b7: I'm a student here at the tower. I don't know what I'll do now. Maybe I'll go home to Ardougne. Or maybe I'll pick up a new magical field to study.
textByHashes.02c7bf49f8a7dd3528e4e7008a46e1088318aa4b: It's a bit embarrassing, but... I got my head swapped with a pumpkin. Luckily an adventurer came along and helped me get it back in place.
textByHashes.c4f1ca526d4f30dc118721707a5236af646b3c37: It looks like you can't afford any crystals. They cost 75000 coins each.
textByHashes.d1de07a632ddc94b6e447b8a1485bd3f3661090e: The crystals I'm selling are quite delicate. I'd feel more comfortable selling them on a members' world.
textByHashes.2ffe18025a4bde9a46c8368f247a4da4faa5482d: Although you cannot technically take them into the Gauntlet, if you enable the feature that teleports you if you zone out and have a crystal on you when entering, it will continue to work within.
textByHashes.2578168c8f45faaf8fc7ea88712ceeda370921dd: Oh. Right! I have these crystal shards that will let you escape from particularly dangerous situations. They only work in certain places. I call them Members objects.
textByHashes.e9fdddb88543aa2d78936d86f86702cc50f48fc9: Sometimes you get caught in places that won't let you teleport out by normal means. These crystals are specially crafted to let you escape those scenarios. I've recently enhanced them as well!
textByHashes.bbaf4ec05d5b4e2c1730cd0907397a74ab577e15: Have you ever found yourself zoning out, and come back to reality to find yourself under attack and on the brink of death? Well you can configure them to teleport you to safety if !
textByHashes.0e9370c40334a3e19b0d6e20db900d1ba8cfc179: It does mean they are likely to trigger in combat, although I'm working on that. But they should let you run through a dangerous area as long as you don't stop in the middle.
textByHashes.fcdab69db4a1c92cc3965abfc59e720cdf7f8643: They also now work in any place a ring of life would. Talking about rings of life, they can also act just like one if you configure them to be so.
textByHashes.535a7d87805864383c76e4492a6548fa83085474: 'Allo mate! Got a job going? Only 500 coins!
textByHashes.1caea6b16f44633a60c20a9b2e55eb78ed9b92cb: I'm a great cook, me! I used to work with a rat-catcher, I used to cook for him. There's a dozen different ways you can cook rat!
textByHashes.a3020be12547d0386139190ce01530c6c3edc022: Well, city warder Bravek once threw a chair at me and yelled at me to get him a hangover cure. So I made it and I think it worked, 'cause then he threw another chair at me and that one hit!
textByHashes.7ecf4018a6c1122ed85d1e75aa288d36e0da2ed7: Sorry mate, but I'm not allowed to work for anyone without level 20 Construction. It's a safety 'azard!
textByHashes.a8c29ecf0f6d07faed570a7fac786fdb26c9225e: Nice try, mate, but I don't start work without cash up front.
textByHashes.b73b2c8a06719957047527c0faebeeb0e09152ee: Cheers, mate! Look forward to working with you!
